title: Horse Pendant
description:
小马挂件，附图解

**标签**: #马年小马已就位 #一起来钩织 #钩针挂件 #钩针小物 #小马 #我的小马驹 #钩针图解 #钩织的乐趣
author: 玩儿个毛线吖（接🥚）

patterns.englishText:
Horse Pendant — Complete Pattern

Body (make 2 pieces):
Row 1: Ch 5, starting in 2nd ch from hook, 4 sc in back bumps (4)
Row 2: Turn, sc, inc, 2 sc (5)
Rows 3-4: Turn, 5 sc. Fasten off. (5)

Make a second piece (Rows 1-4) but do NOT fasten off, continue:
Row 5: Turn, 4 sc, inc, ch 6, join to first piece, inc, 4 sc (18 including chain)
Rows 6-11: Turn, 18 sc (18)
Row 12: Turn, 16 sc, dec (17)
Row 13: Turn, dec, 14 sc, inc (17)
Row 14: Turn, dec, 14 sc, inc (17)
Row 15: Turn, dec, 6 sc, inc, ch 5 (for head)
Row 16: Starting in 2nd ch from hook, 5 sc, inc, 5 sc, dec
Row 17: Turn, dec, 5 sc, inc, 5 sc
Row 18: Turn, 5 sc, inc, 5 sc, dec
Row 19: Turn, dec, 5 sc, inc, 5 sc

Head shaping:
Row 20: Turn, 6 sc, inc, 4 sc, dec
Row 21: Turn, dec, 4 sc, dec
Row 22: Turn, dec, 2 sc, dec
Row 23: Turn, dec twice. Fasten off.

Join two pieces: Sc around the edge, inc at corners. Border with contrasting color sl st around.

Saddle:
Row 1: Ch 10, starting in 2nd ch from hook: 8 sc, 3 sc in last st (corner), 7 sc on other side, inc (20)
Row 2: Inc, 7 hdc, 3 inc, 7 hdc, 2 inc (26)
Row 3: Sc around without inc/dec. Sl st border in accent color. Attach mane and tail.

Coin:
Rnd 1: Ch 21, starting in 2nd ch from hook: *(hdc, dc, tr, sl st)*, repeat 4 times, join in round
Rnd 2: *(4 sc, inc)*, repeat 4 times (make 2 pieces). Sew together with gold thread.
patterns.chineseText:
小马钩织图解
R1.5ch倒2挑里山钩4X
R2.翻转织片，X, V, 2X
R3~R4.翻转5X断线
再钩织一片1~4不断线继续钩织
R5.翻转，4X, V, 6ch连接一个织片，钩V, 4X
R6~R11.翻转，18X
R12.翻转，16X, A
R13.翻转，A, 14X, V
R14.翻转，A, 14X, V
R15.翻转，A, 6X, V, 5ch
R16.倒2回钩，5X, V, 5X, A
R17.翻转，A, 5X, V, 5X
R18.翻转，5X, V, 5X, A
R19.翻转，A5X, V5X
龙
R20.翻转，6X, V, 4X, A
R21.翻转，A,4X, A
R22.翻转，A,2X,A
R23.翻转，2A
将两片拼接钩织一圈短针，拐角处钩V加针，再用其他颜色的线引拔一圈
马鞍：
R1.10ch倒2钩8X, W, 7X, V
R2.V，7T, 3V, 7T, 2V
R3.钩一圈不加不减短针，钩色线引拔一圈，最后系上鬃毛和马尾
金币：
r1:21ch，倒二回钩(T, F, E, TSL)*4连接成圆
r2：(4X, v)*4钩两片 然后用金线缝合
patterns.notes: X=sc, V=inc, A=dec, W=3sc in 1st, T=hdc, F=dc, E=tr. Flat piece worked in turned rows, then two pieces joined. Add mane and tail with yarn fringe.

title: Cherry Blossom & Lily of the Valley Pendant
description:
是超级温柔的樱花啊！
钩针：2.0mm
毛线：@雪妃尔毛线 萌娃娃2号
参考图解：@兔卷卷 👍
色号：40、04、12

**标签**: #手工编织花朵 #钩针花束 #一起来钩织 #钩针日常 #钩针小物 #钩针樱花 #手工钩织
author: 阿瑶睡不醒吖

patterns.englishText:
Cherry Blossom & Lily of the Valley Pendant — Step 1: Cherry Blossom Petals

Step 1: MR, (dc, ch 1) x 9, sl st to join
Step 2: Change color. In ch-sp: sc, ch 1. In next ch-sp: (dc, ch 1) x 3. Repeat 5 times for 5 petals.
Steps 3-4: Continue working into spaces to complete 5 petal groups.
Steps 5-7: Work into each dc of previous round to add petal definition.
Step 8: Make 2 cherry blossom pieces.
patterns.chineseText:
1、钩樱花片
1.环起钩9组1个长针、1个锁子针
2.换线，在大洞里钩短针、锁子针
3.下一个大洞里钩长针、锁子针，钩3组
4.钩5组
5.先在第一个长针上钩
6.第二个长针上钩
7.第三个长针上钩
8.钩两片樱花
patterns.notes: Use 2.0mm hook. Color numbers: 40, 04, 12. Photo tutorial showing step-by-step construction.

patterns.englishText:
Cherry Blossom & Lily of the Valley Pendant — Step 2: Lily of the Valley Buds

Rnd 1: 5 sc in MR (5)
Rnd 2: Ch 3, 5 (dc, ch 1) around (5 ch-sps)
Rnd 3: Change color. In each ch-sp: 6 incomplete hdc, yarn over and pull through all loops at once, ch 1 (puff stitch in each space)
Rnd 4: In each space between puffs: sc, 2 dc, sc
Make 4 buds total.
patterns.chineseText:
2、钩铃兰花
1.环起5个短针
2.在二圈每组1个长针1个锁子，3.换线，在大洞里完钩6个未完成中长针，4.一次拉过
5.一个锁针
6.第二圈，在大洞里钩短针、2个长针、短针
7.钩4个
patterns.notes: These are the small bell-shaped lily of the valley flowers that hang from the pendant.

patterns.englishText:
Cherry Blossom & Lily of the Valley Pendant — Step 3: Straps & Assembly

Step 1: Ch 100, leaving long tails on both ends.
Step 2: Attach strap to one cherry blossom piece.
Step 3: Sew two cherry blossom pieces together (wrong sides facing).
Step 4: Make second strap: ch 10, sl st through the first strap loop, continue chaining for the other side.
Step 5: Thread cherry blossom pieces onto the straps.
patterns.chineseText:
3、钩带子
1.先钩100个辫子，两头预留一段线
2.将带子先粘在一片樱花上
3.两片樱花粘一起
4.钩第二条带子，先钩10个锁针，从之前穿过去引拔，继续钩另外一片锁子
5.将樱花分别穿入带子里
patterns.notes: Assembly instructions. The pendant has a main cherry blossom with lily of the valley buds hanging below.

patterns.englishText:
Cherry Blossom & Lily of the Valley Pendant — Complete Written Pattern

Cherry Blossom Piece (make 2):
Rnd 1: MR, ch 4, *(dc, ch 1)*, repeat 9 times, sl st to join (9 dc, 9 ch-sps)
Rnd 2: Change color. *[In first ch-sp: sc, ch 1. In next ch-sp: (dc, ch 1) x 3]*, repeat 5 times (5 petals)
Rnd 3: *[In first dc of petal: sc, hdc, ch 1. In second dc: dc, ch 3, sl st in 3rd ch from hook (picot), ch 3, dc, ch 1. In third dc: hdc, sc]*, repeat 5 times (5 petals with picots)
Make 2 pieces. Sew together through back loops.

Lily of the Valley Bud (make 4):
Rnd 1: 5 sc in MR (5)
Rnd 2: Ch 3, *(dc, ch 1)*, repeat 5 times (5 ch-sps)
Rnd 3: Change color. In each of the 6 spaces: 6 incomplete hdc, yarn over and pull through all loops, ch 1 (6 puff stitches)
Rnd 4: Between each puff: *(sc, 2 dc, sc)*, repeat 6 times around
patterns.chineseText:
樱花铃兰花

樱花片：
R1:环起，4CH,(F、CH)*9
R2：换线，[在第1圈洞内钩X、CH，下个洞内(F、CH)*3]*5
R3（在第2圈的第一个F处钩X、T、CH，第二个F处钩F、3CH、SL、3CH、F、CH，第三个F处钩T、X)*5
花片需钩织两片，挑内半针缝合。

铃兰花：
R1:5x
R2:3CH，5（F，CH）
R3:换线，在6个大洞里分别钩6个未完成中长针，一次性拖过所有线圈，锁一针
R4:在两个花瓣中间钩（X，2F，X），重复6次
patterns.notes: Use 2.0mm hook. F=dc, X=sc, T=hdc, CH=ch, SL=sl st. Cherry blossom uses 2 colors (pink center + lighter petals). Lily of the valley uses green + white.

patterns.englishText:
Cherry Blossom Pendant — Complete Pattern

Flower (make 2):
Rnd 1: Ch 4, 9 (dc, ch 1) in ring, sl st to join (9 dc)
Rnd 2: Change color. *Sc in ch-sp, ch 1, (dc, ch 1, dc, ch 1, dc, ch 1) in next ch-sp*, repeat 5 times (5 petals)
Rnd 3: *(Sc, hdc), skip 1, (ch 1, dc, ch 3, sl st in 3rd ch from hook, ch 3, dc, ch 1), skip 1, (hdc, sc)*, repeat 5 times around (5 petals with picots)

Make 2 pieces, sew together with wrong sides facing using whip stitch through inner loops.

Leaf:
Ch 7, starting in 2nd ch from hook: sc, hdc, 2 dc, hdc, tr, hdc, 2 dc, hdc, sc. Ch 8 to connect.

Strap:
Ch to desired length for hanging loop.
patterns.chineseText:
樱花挂件图解：
R1:4CH, 9 (F,CH)
R2：换线，5 [(X,CH), (F,CH,F,CH,F,CH)]
R3: (X,T), K1, (CH,F,3CH,SL,3CH,F,CH), K1, (T.X), 一共钩5组

叶子：起7ch倒2回钩x、t、2f、t、w、t、2f、t、x、8ch连接

挂绳：起辫子针钩到合适的长度
patterns.notes: Use 2.0mm hook. F=dc, X=sc, T=hdc, W=tr, CH=ch, SL=sl st, K=skip. The pattern uses letter abbreviations common in Chinese crochet notation.

patterns.englishText:
Stardew Valley Chicken

Chicken Body:
Rnd 1: 12 dc in MR (12)
Rnd 2: Dc inc in each st (24)
Rnd 3: *Dc, dc inc* x10, skip 4 (30)
Rnd 4: Skip 1, turn, work back: *dc, dc inc* x10 (40)
Rnd 5: Skip 1, turn: 6 dc, skip 1, sl st, *skip 1, 6 dc, skip 1, sl st* x7, 5 sc, *3 dc* x3, sl st

Beak: Pick up sc and 3-dc group, work: dc, sc
Comb: From 5th st from left: hdc, hdc-dc, dc-hdc, hdc-hdc, hdc, sl st

Original by tiktok: thecrochetgirlie

Size guide:
Small chick: 2.0mm hook, 4-ply milk cotton
(Note: All dc were accidentally worked as hdc)
Regular chicken: 2.0mm hook, 4-ply milk cotton
Large chicken: 4.0mm hook, 4-ply double strand

patterns.englishText:
Star Piece x2:
Rnd 1: Ch 16, join in ring, 16 sc around (16)
Rnd 2: *Inc, sc* x8 (24)
Rnd 3: *Inc, 2 sc* x8 (32)
Rnd 4: *Inc, 3 sc* x8 (40)

Starting from Rnd 5, work each star point over 8 sts:
Row 5: 8 sc
Row 6: Turn, skip first st, sc2tog at end of row, 4 sc, sc2tog, pull through (6)
Row 7: Turn, skip first, 2 sc, sc2tog at end (4)
Row 8: Turn, sc2tog at end (2)
Row 9: Turn, 1 sc
Sl st, fasten off. Repeat Rows 5-9 for all 5 points.

Finish: Sc border around entire star edge. Leave long tail on one piece for sewing.

Leaves x2:
(Leave long starting tail for sewing)
Ch 14, work in 3rd ch from hook: sl st, sc, hdc, 2 dc, 3 hdc, 2 dc, hdc,
sl st, ch 1, (other side) sl st,
hdc, 2 dc, 3 hdc, 2 dc, hdc, sc, sl st. Fasten off.
patterns.chineseText:
星星织片×2
R1: 16CH，头尾连起来在16CH上钩16X
R2: (V, X) 8
R3: (V, 2X) 8
R4: (V, 3X) 8
从R5开始每8针一个星星角
R5: 8X
R6: 反转，第一个针目不织，倒数第二个针目未完成短针，4X，倒数第二个针目未完成短针,在最后一针目的短针一次带线过（就是减针裙）
R7: 反转，第一个针目不织，倒数第二个针目2X，倒数第二个针目未完成短针,在最后一针目一次带过
R8: 反转，倒数第二个针目织未完成短针，在最后一针目一次带过
R9: 反转，1X
引拔断线，重复R5-R9直至完成5个角
最后在星星织片的边缘织一圈短针，一片星星织片就完成啦！其中一片织完可留长线缝合

叶子×2:
(起针的线头可留长一些用于与主体缝合) 起14CH，倒3回钩，引拔，1X, 1T, 2F, 3E, 2F, 1T,
引拔, 1CH, (另一边) 引拔,
1T, 2F, 3E, 2F, 1T, 1X, 引拔, 断线
patterns.notes: Star fruit piece from Stardew Valley. Two star-shaped pieces sewn together and stuffed. Pink/purple star with green leaves.

author: 非正常手表研发中心

patterns.englishText:
Cute Watch Pattern
Yarn: Size 4, Red #66, Blue #23, White #02
Hook: 2.5mm

Watch Face:
Rnd 1: 8 sc in MR (8)
Rnd 2: *Sc, 3 sc in next st* x4 (16)
Rnd 3: 2 sc, 3 sc in next, *3 sc, 3 sc in next* x3, sc (24)

Watch Frame:
Rnd 1: 8 sc in MR (8)
Rnd 2: *Sc, 3 sc in next st* x4 (16)
Rnd 3: 2 sc, 3 sc in next, *3 sc, 3 sc in next* x3, sc (24)
Rnd 4: 3 sc, 3 sc in next, ch 5 (skip 5), 3 sc in next, 5 sc, 3 sc in next, ch 5 (skip 5), 3 sc in next, 2 sc
Rnd 5: Sc in each st, BLO (away from you)
Rnd 6: 2 sc, dec, 2 sc, *2 sc, dec* x6, 2 sc

Button: 7 sc in MR, sew on

Strap:
1. Ch 4, sc in 2nd ch, 3 sc
2. Continue sc rows to desired length, leave buttonhole
3. Sc border around entire strap, inc at 4 corners for rounded edges
patterns.chineseText:
可爱手表图解
毛线: 萌4, 红#66、蓝#23、白#02
钩针: 2.5

表盘:
1: 环起8X
2: 4个(X, W)
3: 2X, W, 3个(3X, W), X

表托:
1: 环起8X
2: 4个(X, W)
3: 2X, W, 3个(3X, W), X
4: 3X, W, 5CH(空5针) W, 5X, W, 5CH(空5针), W, 2X
5: 不加不减X(远离自己内半针)
6: 2X, A, 2X, 6(2X, A), 2X

按钮: 环起7X，缝合

表带:
1. 4个辫子针，倒二回钩3个短针
2. 钩到合适长度，留出扣子位置
3. 沿着整个表带再钩一圈短针，4个角加一针更圆润
patterns.notes: Cute crochet watch with working strap. Red, blue, and white yarn. 2.5mm hook.

patterns.englishText:
Round Coaster (symbol chart)
This uses the same pattern as the small bag lid from video tutorial.
After last sc of final round, sl st into first sc of last round to join.

patterns.notes: Round coaster with scalloped edge. Symbol chart. 5-ply milk cotton yarn.

patterns.englishText:
Rnd 1: 14 dc in MR (14)
Rnd 2: Ch 2, dc, dc inc x13, sl st to first dc (27)
Rnd 3: Ch 2, *ch 1, dc* x27, ch 1, sl st (55)
Rnd 4: Ch 2, dc inc in first ch-1 sp, dc inc in each ch-1 sp, sl st (77)
Rnd 5: *Sc, inc, 2 sc, inc* x11 (77)

title: Summer Lace Circle Bag
description:
之前发的包包款式，这款呼声很高，所以把教程干出来了。希望能帮到大家。[萌萌哒R][害羞R] 这款包包还是比较小清新的，大家可以试试用空心棉线，或者拉菲棉草线钩织，应该都会比较适合夏天。@hatsumi3280
	
包身：
R1：（T）环形起长针，14针；
R2：（TV）长针，每个洞加一针，28针；
R3：（T，CH）一个长针，一个锁针，织到40针；最后最后是连续8个长针，这个部分是包包开口的位置（8T）；最后一个锁针结束这一圈；共49针；
R4：（TV）每个洞加一针，织38针后，翻转织片；（需要留出包包开口的位置不织了）
R5：（X，V）短针行，隔一针加一针，共57针；翻转织片；
R6：（T，CH）长针行，一针长针，一针锁针；共57针；翻转织片；
R7：（X）短针行，共57针；翻转织片；
R8：（X， K，4T，K，X）一针短针，控一个洞，下一个洞，一个洞4个长针，再控一个洞，钩一个短针；总共钩14组这个纹样；然后翻转织片；
R9：（X，TV，CH，TV，X）这一行跟上一行差不多，只是4个长针之间多了一个锁针，具体可以看图“细节”那；也是14组纹样，翻转织片；
R10: （SL，6T，SL）一个引拔针，在上一行锁针的位置，钩6个长针，再接一个引拔针，完成一个纹样；共编织14组；
编织完成后，需要沿着包口的位置，编织一行短针；
这就完成了包身的织片，总共需要两片；
	
包身侧面：
锁针起98针，织98个长针；
沿着2片包身织片边缘缝合，完成包包主体；
	
包盖：
R1：（T）环形起长针，14针；
R2：（TV）长针，每个洞加一针，28针；
R3：（T，CH）一个长针，一个锁针，织56针；
R4：（T）56针长针；
R5：（X，XV）短针行，隔一针加一针，共织82针；
R6：（T，CH）长针行，一针长针，一针锁针，共82针；
R7：（2X，2CH，2X）短针行，两个短针，两个锁针，再两个短针；这样的纹样，共20组；
R8：（SL，5T，SL）一个引拔针，然后在上一行两个锁针的位置，钩5个长针，这样为一个纹样，总共要编织20组；
这样包盖的部分就完成了；把包盖缝合在合适的包身位置即可；

title: Bubble Princess Dress for Labubu (Knit)
description:

#大人也要玩玩具[话题]# #娃衣[话题]# #图解[话题]# #毛线[话题]# #泡泡玛特[话题]# #ymy素体[话题]# #zsiga[话题]#
author: 柚子手作

patterns.englishText:
Bubble Princess Dress (Labubu)
Cast on 36 sts (&=YO, K1, YO)
[Worked flat]
(54) Row 1: K6, &, KFB x5, &, K10, &, KFB x5, &, K6
Rows 2-4-6-8: Purl all
(86) Row 3: K7, &, KFB x12, &, K12, &, KFB x12, &, K7
(94) Row 5: K8, &, K26, &, K14, &, K26, &, K9
(102) Row 7: K9, &, K28, &, K16, &, K28, &, K9
(110) Row 9: K10, &, K30, &, K18, &, K30, &, K10
[Rnd 10: Join in round]
(50) Rnd 10: K11, hold 34 sleeve sts, M4, K20, M4, hold 34 sleeve sts, K11
(70) Rnd 11: *K2, &, K2* x10
Rnds 12-26: Continue increasing pattern
(210) Rnd 25: *K9, &* x10
(110) Rnd 27: *K2tog x5, K1, K2tog x5* x10

Sleeves: Pick up 6 underarm + 34 held sts = 40 sts
Rnds 1-4: K40
Rnd 5: K2tog around (20)
patterns.notes: This is a KNITTING pattern (not crochet) for a bubble princess dress for Labubu doll. Uses YO increases and K2tog decreases. Worked flat then joined in round.

title: Large Elephant Amigurumi (10-page pattern)
description:
是谁拥有了同款～
毛毛泰国同款小象🐘
感谢图解老师@糖糖
#钩织[话题]# #泰国毛不易同款挂件[话题]# #毛不易[话题]# #毛不易同款[话题]# #钩针挂件[话题]##钩织小象[话题]#
author: 面包还是盼盼好（接🥚ing）

patterns.englishText:
Page 1 - Body:
Rnd 1: Ch 9, sc in 2nd ch from hook, 7 sc, 3 sc in last ch (turn corner: 2 sc on right, rotate chain, 1 sc on left), 6 sc, inc in last st [oval shape] (18)
Rnd 2: Inc, 6 sc, inc x3, 6 sc, inc x2 (24)
Rnd 3: 8 sc, inc, sc, inc, 11 sc (27)
Rnd 4: Inc, 9 sc, inc, 2 sc, inc, 6 sc, inc, sc, inc, sc (33)
Rnd 5: 2 sc, inc, 6 sc, inc, 3 sc, inc, 3 sc, inc, 11 sc, 2 sc, inc (39)
Rnd 6: Inc, 11 sc, inc, 4 sc, inc, 4 sc, inc, 8 sc, inc, 3 sc, inc, 3 sc (45)
Rnd 7: 15 sc, inc, 5 sc, inc, 5 sc, 17 sc (48)
Rnd 8: 2 sc, inc, 14 sc, inc, 6 sc, inc, 6 sc, inc, 8 sc, inc, 4 sc, inc, 2 sc (54)
Rnd 9: *Sc, inc* around (60)
patterns.notes: Elephant amigurumi (Mao Buyi style). 10-page pattern. Rnd 1 tension should be slightly tight. Keep subsequent rounds slightly loose for smooth oval shape.

patterns.englishText:
Page 2:
Rnd 10: 6 sc, inc, 8 sc, inc, 8 sc, inc, 18 sc, inc, 6 sc, inc (66)
Rnd 11: Sc in each st around (66)
Rnd 12: Inc, 17 sc, inc, 9 sc, inc, 9 sc, inc, 11 sc, inc, 7 sc, inc, 7 sc (72)
Rnd 13: Sc in each st around (72)
Rnd 14: 2 sc, inc, 18 sc, inc, 10 sc, inc, 10 sc, inc, 12 sc, inc, 8 sc, inc, 6 sc (78)
Rnd 15: Sc in each st around (78)
Rnd 16: 4 sc, inc, 19 sc, inc, 11 sc, inc, 11 sc, inc, 13 sc, inc, 9 sc, inc, 5 sc (84)
Rnd 17: Sc in each st around (84). Place eyes between Rnds 16-17.
Rnd 18: 6 sc, inc, 20 sc, inc, 12 sc, inc, 12 sc, inc, 14 sc, inc, 10 sc, inc, 4 sc (90)
Rnds 19-22: Sc in each st around (90)
Rnd 23: 39 sc, ch 6 (skip 12 sc), 39 sc (84)
Rnd 24: 37 sc, dec, 6 sc, dec, 37 sc (82)
Rnd 25: Sc in each st around (82) - mark last sc for leg chain connection
patterns.notes: Elephant body continued. Eyes placed between Rnds 16-17. Rnd 23 creates trunk hole.

patterns.englishText:
Page 3 - Trunk:
Rnd 26: Skip 37 sc. Rejoin yarn and work 8 sc (8)
Row 27: Ch 1, turn, sc across (8)
Row 28: Ch 1, turn, dec, 4 sc, dec (6)
Row 29: Ch 1, turn, dec, 2 sc, dec (4)
Row 30: Ch 1, turn, dec x2 (2). Mark last st - connects to leg chain.
Sl st, fasten off.

[Diagram shows: Hole for the trunk (count 15 sts), with Leg Chain A, B, C, D positions marked around the body oval]
patterns.chineseText:
第三页:
R26: 跳过37X。重新加入毛线并制作 8X (8)
R27: ch锁针1, turn翻面, 1X in 锁针X (8)
R28: ch锁针1, turn翻面, 1A, 4X, 1A (6)
R29: ch锁针1, turn翻面, 1A, 2X, 1A (4)
R30: ch锁针1, turn翻面, 2A (2) 最后一针做个标记——会连接做腿的辫子
隐拔系紧。
腿:
patterns.notes: Trunk shaping (worked flat in rows, decreasing). Includes diagram showing leg chain placement.

patterns.englishText:
Page 6 - Leg A:
Start from last st of Rnd 25
Rnd 1: 21 sc (body), 6 sc (on Leg A chain) (27)
Rnd 2: 27 sc (27)
Rnd 3: 5 sc, dec, 12 sc, dec, 6 sc (25)
Rnd 4: 17 sc, dec, 6 sc (24)
Rnd 5: *2 sc, dec* x6 (18)
Rnd 6: *Sc, dec* x6 (12)
Rnd 7: Dec x6 (6)
Fasten off, close hole and weave in ends.

Leg B:
Count 15 sts from triangle edge, rejoin yarn.
Rnd 1: 15 sc (body), 6 sc (triangle edge), 6 sc (Leg B chain) (27)
patterns.chineseText:
第六页 - A腿:
从第25行的最后一针开始
R1: 21X(身体), 6X(A辫子上的锁针) (27)
R2: 27X (27)
R3: 5X, 1A, 12X, 1A, 6X (25)
R4: 17X, 1A, 6X (24)
R5: (2X, 1A) 重复6次 (18)
R6: (1X, 1A) 重复6次 (12)
R7: 6A (6)
系好，顺着最后一针盖住小洞并隐藏线尾。

B腿:
从三角片边缘处数15针，接毛线。
R1: 15X(身体), 6X(三角片边缘), 6X(B辫子) (27)
patterns.notes: Elephant legs A and B. Each leg starts by picking up stitches from body and chain spaces.

patterns.englishText:
Page 7:
Rnd 2: 27 sc (27)
Rnd 3: Dec, 12 sc, dec, 11 sc (25)
Rnd 4: Dec, 23 sc (24)
Rnd 5: *2 sc, dec* x6 (18)
Rnd 6: *Sc, dec* x6 (12)
Rnd 7: Dec x6 (6)
Fasten off.

Leg C:
From last st of Rnd 30 (marked), rejoin yarn.
Rnd 1: 6 sc (along triangle), 15 sc (body), 6 sc (Leg C chain) (27)
Rnd 2: 27 sc (27)
Rnd 3: 5 sc, dec, 12 sc, dec, 6 sc (25)
Rnd 4: 17 sc, dec, 6 sc (24)
Rnd 5: *2 sc, dec* x6 (18)
Rnd 6: *Sc, dec* x6 (12)
Rnd 7: Dec x6 (6)
patterns.notes: Legs B (continued) and C. Same decrease pattern for all legs.

patterns.englishText:
Page 8 - Leg D:
Rnd 1: 21 sc (body), 6 sc (Leg D chain) (27)
Rnd 2: 27 sc (27)
Rnd 3: Dec, 12 sc, dec, 11 sc (25)
Rnd 4: Dec, 23 sc (24)
Rnd 5: *2 sc, dec* x6 (18)
Rnd 6: *Sc, dec* x6 (12)
Rnd 7: Dec x6 (6)
Fasten off.

Trunk:
Rejoin yarn in trunk hole. Start at middle of triangle (triangle = 6 sc).
Rnd 1: 3 sc (half of triangle), 12 sc (body), 3 sc (other half of triangle) (18)
Rnd 2: 18 sc (18)
Rnd 3: *Dec, 4 sc* x3 (15)
Rnds 4-5: Sc in each st around (15)
Rnd 6: *Dec, 3 sc* x3 (12)
Rnds 7-8: Sc in each st around (12)
patterns.chineseText:
第八页 - D腿起针位置接线:
R1: 21X(身体), 6X(D辫子) (27)
R2: 27X (27)
R3: 1A, 12X, 1A, 11X (25)
R4: 1A, 23X (24)
R5: (2X, 1A) 重复6次 (18)
R6: (1X, 1A) 重复6次 (12)
R7: 6A (6)

象鼻:
在象鼻预留的孔中重新接线。在三角片中间重新接线(三角片由6个X组成)。
R1: 3X(三角片的一半), 12X(身体的), 3X(三角片的另一半) (18)
R2: 18X (18)
R3: (1A, 4X), 重复3次 (15)
R4-5: 15X (15)
R6: (1A, 3X), 重复3次 (12)
R7-8: 12X (12)
patterns.notes: Leg D and Trunk. Trunk is worked by picking up stitches around the hole left in Rnd 23.

patterns.englishText:
Page 9:
Rnd 9: *Dec, 2 sc* x3 (9)
Rnd 10: Sc in each st around (9)
Rnd 11: *Dec, sc* x3 (6)
Fasten off, close hole, weave in ends.

Belly:
Rnd 1: 6 sc in MR (6)
Rnd 2: Inc in each st around (12)
Rnd 3: *Sc, inc* x6 (18)
Rnd 4: *Inc, 2 sc* x6 (24)
Stuff body and trunk firmly. Sew belly piece to the edges of the 4 leg chains. Belly should fit perfectly: 24 sts = 4 legs x 6 chain sts each.

Ears (make 2):
Rnd 1: Ch 7, sc in 2nd ch from hook, 4 sc, 3 sc in last ch (turn), 4 sc, inc [oval] (14)
Rnd 2: Inc, 4 sc, inc x3, 4 sc, inc x2 (20)
Rnd 3: Sc, inc, 5 sc, inc, sc, inc, sc, inc, 5 sc, inc, sc, inc (26)
Rnd 4: *Inc, 2 sc* x8 (32)
patterns.chineseText:
第九页:
R9: (1A, 2X), 重复3次 (9)
R10: 9X (9)
R11: (1A, 1X), 重复3次 (6)
系好，顺着最后一针盖住小洞并隐藏线尾。

腹部:
R1: 环形起针 6X
R2: 6V (12)
R3: (1X, 1V), 重复6次 (18)
R4: (1V, 2X), 重复6次 (24)
牢固地塞住身体和躯干。要收紧腹部，请将钩针编织的腹部部分连接到四个腿链的边缘。腹部部分应该完美贴合，因为它由24针组成，而腿链每个由6条链组成（即4条腿链 x 6条链 = 24针）。

耳朵(制作×2):
R1: 7个锁针辫子，倒数第二针开始5X。最后一针3X(转动辫子2X+1X)，继续4X，最后一个锁针里1V[制作椭圆形]。(14X)
R2: 1V, 4X, 3V, 4X, 2V (20)
R3: 1X, 1V, 5X, 1V, 1X, 1V, 1X, 1V, 5X, 1V, 1X, 1V (26)
R4: (V, 2X) 8 (32)
patterns.notes: Trunk end, belly piece, and ears. Belly connects to all 4 leg openings.

patterns.englishText:
Page 10:
Rnds 5-6: 2 hdc, 9 sc, 7 hdc, 9 sc, 5 hdc (32)
Rnd 7: *Dec, 8 sc, dec, 4 sc* x2 (28)
Sew ears to body.

Tail:
Rnd 1: 4 sc in MR (4)
Rnd 2: Sc in each st around (4)
Rnd 3: *Inc, sc* x2 (6)
Rnd 4: Sc in each st around (6)
Rnd 5: *Inc, 2 sc* x2 (8)
Rnds 6-7: Sc in each st around (8)
Fasten off, leave long tail for sewing to body.
patterns.chineseText:
第十页:
R5-6: 2hdc(中长针), 9X, 7hdc, 9X, 5hdc (32)
R7: (1A, 8X, 1A, 4X), 重复2次 (28)
将耳朵缝合在身体上。

尾巴:
R1: 环形起针4个短针 4X (4)
R2: 4X (4)
R3: (1V, 1X), 重复2次 (6)
R4: 6X (6)
R5: (1V, 2X), 重复2次 (8)
R6-7: 8X (8)
系好并留长头缝在身体上。
patterns.notes: Ears (continued) with hdc shaping for curved top, and tail. Sew all pieces to body.

Rnd 6: *3 sc, inc* x3 (15)

Rnds 8-32: Sc in each st around (20)

Rnd 33: *8 sc, dec* x2 (18)

patterns.chineseText:
jellycat铅笔（图解）
主体:
R1: 环起4x
R2: 2(x,v)
R3: 3(x,v)
换淡黄色 R4: 9x

title: Mini Pokémon Amigurumi Set (10 characters)
description:
有没有和我一样超爱宝可梦的友友们！今天来给大家分享 10 只超萌的迷你宝可梦图解，每一只都可爱到犯规，赶紧来看看有没有你喜欢的宝可梦吧💕
🎈皮卡丘
永远的萌神皮卡丘，圆滚滚的身体，闪电形状的尾巴，脸颊上的电气袋粉粉嫩嫩，仿佛在对你卖萌放电。
🎈伊布
可以进化成多种形态的伊布，本身就超级可爱。毛茸茸的身体，大大的耳朵，像个小团子一样，让人忍不住想要抱一抱。
🎈菊草叶
嫩绿的身体，背上的大叶子就像一把小伞。它的眼神总是那么天真无邪，头上的小芽更是增添了几分俏皮。
🎈波克比
蛋形的身体，小小的翅膀扑棱扑棱的。波克比的笑容超级治愈，仿佛能驱散所有的阴霾。
🎈胖丁
粉色的胖丁，身体软绵绵的。它那一双大眼睛和小小的嘴巴，唱歌的时候肚子还会一鼓一鼓的，真的太萌啦！
🎈可达鸭
顶着一头乱乱的黄毛，眼神呆滞却又莫名可爱的可达鸭。它的嘴巴扁扁的，经常会因为头疼而做出各种搞笑的动作。
🎈妙蛙种子
背着大种子的妙蛙种子，绿色的皮肤看起来充满生机。种子上的花纹很精致，它的四肢短短粗粗的，非常憨态可掬。
🎈杰尼龟
蓝色的杰尼龟，龟壳圆润光滑。它的大眼睛和长长的耳朵很有特色，喷水的时候超酷的，不喷水的时候就是个可爱的小乖乖。
🎈小火龙
橙色的小火龙，尾巴上的火焰🔥燃烧不息。它的身体小巧玲珑，爪子尖尖的，看起来很有活力，是个热情似火的小家伙。
🎈长尾怪手
长长的尾巴可以灵活摆动，身体毛茸茸的长尾怪手。它的眼睛亮晶晶的，喜欢在树林间跳来跳去，活泼又机灵。
这些迷你宝可梦是不是都超级可爱呀！喜欢的话可以点赞收藏哦，后续还会给大家分享更多宝可梦的精彩内容🎉

author: 卡卡

patterns.englishText:
Letter E — Crochet Symbol Chart

Foundation: Ch 22, ch 1 (turning ch), sl st back 6 sts, ch 16 to continue.

Follow the symbol chart to form the letter E shape:
- Blue sections: Work in one direction (right side facing)
- Pink sections: Turn work and crochet in reverse direction
- Green/olive sections: Border/edging stitches
- Black triangle: Starting point
- Black dashed line: Middle bar of the E

Stitches used: sc (X), ch (o), dc (T), inc/shell (V)

The E is constructed by working the vertical spine first, then adding the three horizontal bars (top, middle, bottom) with decorative shell/fan edging.

Tip: Use fabric stiffener or starch spray to shape after completion.
patterns.chineseText:

符号颜色说明：蓝色=正面方向，粉色=翻面方向，绿色/橄榄色=边缘装饰
使用短针(X)、锁针(o)、长针(T)、加针(V)等符号组成字母E形状。
黑色三角形=起始点
patterns.notes: Foundation ch 22. The letter is worked flat with direction changes indicated by color coding in the chart. Blue = forward direction, pink = after turning. Can be used as an applique, bookmark, or decorative initial. The post recommends using stiffener/starch spray for shaping.

patterns.englishText:
Mandala Coaster — Step-by-step Photo Tutorial

Rnd 1 (Color A - pink): *2-dc bobble in MR, ch 2*, repeat 8 times, sl st to first bobble. (8 bobbles, 8 ch-2 sps)
Rnd 2 (Color A): In each ch-2 sp: *(2-dc bobble, ch 2, 2-dc bobble)*, repeat around. (16 bobbles, 8 ch-2 sps)
Rnd 3 (Color B - white): *3 dc in ch-2 sp, dc in next st, 2 dc in next st*, repeat around.
Rnd 4 (Color B): *2 sc, ch 1*, repeat around.
Rnd 5 (Color C - blue): In each ch-1 sp: *(2 dc, ch 1)*, repeat around.
Rnd 6 (Color C): In each ch-1 sp: *(2 dc, ch 1)*, repeat around.
Rnd 7 (Color C): Sc in each st around (working 1 sc per st).
Rnd 8 (Color C): *5 dc in ch-sp (fan/shell), skip 1, sc, skip 1*, repeat around.
Fasten off, weave in ends.
patterns.chineseText:
曼陀罗杯垫步骤图解
R1: 环起(2个未完成长针的枣形针, 2ch)*8
R2: 在每个2ch上钩(2个枣形针, 2ch, 2个枣形针) — 循环
R3: [(2ch上钩3F), 下一针钩F, 再下一针钩(2F)] *8
R4: (2X, ch), 循环一圈
R5: 在每个ch上钩(2F, ch), 循环一圈
R6: 在每个ch上钩(2F, ch), 循环一圈
R7: 一一对应钩一圈短针
R8: (5F, K1, X, K1), 循环钩一圈
patterns.notes: 2.5mm hook. 3 colors of yarn. Bobble = 2-dc cluster (yarn over, insert hook, pull up loop, yarn over, pull through 2 loops; repeat, then pull through all loops). See image 104 for the full symbol chart. Step-by-step photos show each round's progression.

patterns.englishText:
Mandala Coaster — Full Symbol Chart

Circular chart worked from center outward, 8 rounds.
Green symbols: Inner rounds — bobble stitches and dc groups
Red/brown symbols: Outer rounds — fan/shell stitches and sc

Center: Magic ring
Symbols: o = ch, X = sc, T = dc, cluster symbols = bobbles, fan groups = shell stitches

Refer to image 103 (step-by-step) for round-by-round text instructions.
patterns.chineseText:
曼陀罗杯垫符号图解
圆形符号图，由内向外钩织8圈。
绿色部分：枣形针和长针组（内圈）
红/棕色部分：外圈花样（扇形针和短针组合）
中心为环形起针，每圈使用不同颜色标注。
patterns.notes: 2.5mm hook. Full circular symbol chart for the mandala coaster. The two-color printing (green inner, red outer) distinguishes different sections of the pattern. This chart is the visual companion to the step-by-step instructions in image 103.

patterns.englishText:
Simple Coaster

Rnd 1: Ch 3 (counts as dc), 11 dc in MR, sl st to top of ch-3. Fasten off. (12 dc)
Rnd 2: Join yarn, ch 3 (counts as dc), dc in same st, ch 1, *dc-inc in next st, ch 1*, repeat around, sl st to top of ch-3. Fasten off. (24 dc, 12 ch-1 sps)
Rnd 3: Join yarn, ch 3, 2 dc in first ch-1 sp, ch 2, *3 dc in next ch-1 sp, ch 2*, repeat around, sl st to top of ch-3. Fasten off. (36 dc, 12 ch-2 sps)
Rnd 4: Join yarn, ch 3, dc in next st, ch 2, 2 dc in ch-2 sp, *(2 dc, ch 2, 2 dc) in next ch-2 sp*, repeat around, sl st. Fasten off. (48 dc, 12 ch-2 sps)
Rnd 5: Join yarn, ch 3, 6 dc in ch-2 sp (7 dc total with ch-3), sc between the 4-dc groups of Rnd 4, *7 dc in next ch-2 sp, sc between groups*, repeat around, sl st. Fasten off.

Note: Fasten off after each round. Ch 3 at start of each round counts as 1 dc.
patterns.chineseText:
简约杯垫图解
R1: 环起12F
R2: 12(FV, ch) — 即每针钩(长针加针, 1锁针)
R3: 3F(钩在R2的每个ch上), 2ch, 重复
R4: 2F, 2ch, 2F(钩在R3的每个2ch上), 重复
R5: 7F(钩在R4的每个2ch上), X(钩在R4的四个长针的中间位置), 重复
每一圈完成后都断线，起立针3ch充当一个长针
patterns.notes: Symbol chart (quarter section shown). Each round is fastened off and rejoined. The ch-3 turning chain counts as 1 dc. Final round creates a scalloped flower edge with 7-dc fan shells separated by sc.

author: Seven Wu

patterns.englishText:
Triomphe Arch Pendant — Handwritten Chart

This is a miniature Celine Triomphe arch charm worked in multiple steps:

1. Ch 2, 4 dc (working back), ch 2, sl st back 5 sts
2. Ch 5, work petal: sl st, hdc, dc, hdc, sl st (repeat for 3 rows)
3. Ch 4, sl st back 4
4. At front of row 3: ch 5
5. Work downward with sl st along 3 rows, ch 4, sl st back down 3 rows
6. Inc across 3 rows (building the arch columns)
7. After ch 5, repeat from beginning for second column; both sides return to first st, 4 dc, sl st
8. Same as back: 3 sts, 5 sts sl st, hdc, dc, hdc, sl st; then skip 3, ch 6, sl st
9. 3 sl st at front, ch toward center on both sides, sl st back 3, 3 sts, fasten off.

Note: This is handwritten and some details are difficult to read precisely. Refer to the original image for the numbered diagram showing part placement.
patterns.chineseText:
凯旋门挂件（手写图解）
★挂绳
① 2个锁针，倒4钩长针，再2个锁针，5倒4引拔
② 3排5个锁针，顺序为：引拔，中长针，长针，中长针，引拔针
③ 勾4个锁针，倒4钩引拔
④ 来到3排前分5个锁针
⑤ 钩下，3排向引拔，勾4倒3排向引拔
⑥ 加针3排
⑦ 5个锁针后，重复开始钩，两侧回到第一个，倒4到长针，引拔
⑧ 同后部3针5针向引拔，中长针，长针，中长针，引拔，再另一个隔3个6钩针，引拔
⑨ 3排前分3个引拔，然后两侧锁针向中，倒向3引拔，3针，结束
patterns.notes: 2.0mm hook, 4-ply combed milk cotton. Colors: cream white, yellow, blue. Handwritten pattern — some shorthand is ambiguous. The pendant forms a small Triomphe arch shape with a heart at top. The right side of the original image contains numbered diagrams showing the construction order.

author: 柯米嘟嘟

patterns.englishText:
Earth Globe Pattern — Color-coded Amigurumi Chart
Colors: White / Royal Blue / Grass Green / Ginger Yellow

Increase section:
R1: 6 sc in MR (6)
R2: Inc in each st around (12)
R3: *Sc, inc*, repeat around (18)
R4: *2 sc, inc*, repeat around (24)
R5: *3 sc, inc*, repeat around (30)
R6: *4 sc, inc*, repeat around (36)
R7: *5 sc, inc*, repeat around (42)
R8: *6 sc, inc*, repeat around (48)

Body (follow color chart for earth map pattern):
R9-R18: Sc in each st around (48) — change colors per stitch as shown in chart

Decrease section:
R19: *6 sc, dec*, repeat around (42)
R20: *5 sc, dec*, repeat around (36)
R21: *4 sc, dec*, repeat around (30)
R22: *3 sc, dec*, repeat around (24) — begin stuffing
R23: *2 sc, dec*, repeat around (18)
R24: *Sc, dec*, repeat around (12)
R25: *4 sc, dec* (or as charted) — continue stuffing
R26: Dec around, fasten off (6)

Color placement per stitch follows the chart — irregular color changes create the world map continents.
patterns.chineseText:
毛线地球图解（带颜色编排）
颜色：纯白/宝蓝/草绿/姜黄
R1: 6X (6)
R2: 6V (12)
R3: (X, V)×6 (18)
R4: (X, V, X)×6 或类似 (24)
R5: (3X, V)×6 (30)
R6-R7: 继续加针至42-48
R8-R18: 不加不减，按颜色图钩织地球图案
R19起开始减针
R25-R26: 收口
每针的颜色按图中彩色标注排列（绿=草绿，蓝=宝蓝，黄=姜黄，白=纯白）
patterns.notes: 2.0mm hook. 4 colors of yarn (white, royal blue, grass green, ginger yellow). The color chart shows per-stitch color assignments to create a world map pattern. Stuff firmly around the sides to achieve a round shape. Cut connecting threads every 2-3 rounds when changing colors. The increase/decrease structure follows standard amigurumi sphere shaping; the unique aspect is the per-stitch color pattern.

线材：苏苏姐家5号蕾丝线
钩针：1.8mm
图解来源：@口折文手作
	
快试试给自己的耳机钩个可爱的“小窝”，
治愈又好玩~
	
#爱生活爱编织[话题]# #小红书手工友好季[话题]# #手作治愈[话题]# #钩针耳机包[话题]# #网兜[话题]# #耳机包[话题]# #钩针小物[话题]#
author: 一颗柠檬🍋

patterns.englishText:
Mini Net Earphone Bag

Main Body:
R1: Ch 61, skip 24, 5 sc, ch 3, skip 3, sc, *(ch 6, skip 6, sc)* repeat 6 times, ch 3, skip 3, 5 sc
R2: (BLO) 5 sc, *(ch 6, skip 6, sc)* repeat 7 times, (BLO) 5 sc
R3: (BLO) 5 sc, starting in ch-1 sp: ch 3, sc, *(ch 6, sc)* repeat 6 times, ch 3, (BLO) 5 sc
Repeat R2-R3 until R19, fasten off.

Bag Opening:
R1: 19 sc (19)
R2: (BLO) 19 sc (19)
R3: (BLO) 19 sc (19)

Strap + Clasp:
Starting from any side of the bag opening:
R1: 3 sc, 5 sc, 8 sc (1 sc in each net hole), 5 sc, 3 sc, ch 30, 3 sc, 5 sc, 8 sc (1 sc in each net hole), 5 sc, 3 sc, ch 30, sl st to first st
R2-3: (BLO) work even around
patterns.chineseText:
钩针mini渔网耳机包
主体：
R1: 61ch, 倒24钩5X, 3CH, K3, X, (6CH, K6, X)6, 3CH, K3, 5X
R2: (离自己远的半针)5X, (6CH, K6, X)7, (离自己远的半针)5X
R3: (离自己远的半针)5X, 开始在锁针1锁钩钩3CH, X, (6CH, X)6, 3CH, (离自己远的半针)5X
重复R2-3钩织到R19行，断线
袋口：
R1: 19X
R2: (离自己远的半针)19X
R3: (离自己远的半针)19X
袋带+扣：
袋口从侧面任意开始钩R1: 3X, 5X, 8X(网兜位置每个洞钩一个短针), 5X, 3X, 30CH, 3X, 5X, 8X(网兜位置每个洞钩一个短针), 5X, 3X, 30CH, 引导至第一针
R2-3: (离自己远的半针)不加不减钩完
patterns.notes: 1.8mm hook, #5 lace thread. Mini net bag for earphones/AirPods. BLO = back loop only throughout most of the pattern.

title: Flower & Bird Scarf
description:
🌸
环形起针
🐦
蓝色辫子针位置入针钩
手绘图解，🚫盗图
#钩针日常[话题]# #一起来钩织[话题]# #钩针小物[话题]# #手工编织围巾[话题]# #编织图解[话题]# #织围巾[话题]# #羊绒围巾[话题]# #披肩[话题]# #一条围巾百样搭[话题]# #围巾披肩[话题]#
author: 烤个地瓜

patterns.englishText:
Flower & Bird Scarf — Combined reference image.
Left: finished product photo showing the gradient scarf with flower motifs and hummingbird appliques.
Top right: flower motif symbol chart (pink lines).
Bottom right: bird motif symbol chart (blue lines).

Flower: Start with magic ring.
Bird: Hook into the chain stitch positions marked in diagram.

See images 59 and 61 for separate high-resolution charts.
patterns.chineseText: 花鸟围巾组合参考图：左侧成品照，右上为花朵符号图解（粉色），右下为鸟符号图解（蓝色）。花朵环形起针，鸟在蓝色辫子针位置入针钩。
patterns.notes: Combined reference image. Flower motifs and bird motifs are crocheted separately, then joined to form the scarf. Multiple flower sizes create a gradient ombre effect.

patterns.englishText:
Flower Motif — Symbol Chart (5-petal layered flower)

Center: MR
Rnd 1: *(Ch 3, 2 tr in ring, ch 3, sl st in ring)*, repeat 5 times (5 small petals)
Rnd 2: Working behind petals — *ch 5, sc between petals*, repeat around (5 ch-5 loops)
Rnd 3: In each ch-5 loop: (sc, hdc, dc, 3 tr, dc, hdc, sc) — 5 medium petals
Rnd 4: Working behind petals — *ch 7, sc between petals*, repeat around (5 ch-7 loops)
Rnd 5: In each ch-7 loop: (sc, hdc, 2 dc, 5 tr, 2 dc, hdc, sc) — 5 large outer petals
Fasten off, weave in ends.
patterns.chineseText:
花朵图解（5瓣花符号图）
中心环形起针，由内向外钩织多层花瓣。
第1层：5个小花瓣（锁针+长长针组合）
第2层：在花瓣后方钩锁针环，形成5个较大花瓣
第3层：继续在后方加锁针环，钩出最大层花瓣
花瓣由短针、中长针、长针、长长针组合成扇形
patterns.notes: Symbol chart — layered 5-petal flower worked from center outward. Each petal layer is built by crocheting chain loops behind the previous layer. Exact stitch counts should be verified against the symbol chart; the translation above captures the general structure. Part of the flower & bird scarf.

patterns.englishText:
Bird Motif — Symbol Chart (Hummingbird)

Freeform crochet bird worked from tail to beak.
- Tail: Start with chain, work branching tail feathers using ch and sc
- Body: Built with sc and dc stitches in rows/short rows
- Wings: Fan-shaped shell stitch groupings (dc clusters) radiating outward
- Head & Beak: Sc decreases for shaping, ch for beak

This is an artistic freeform piece — follow the symbol chart closely for stitch placement, direction changes, and shaping. Symbols: X = sc, T = dc, o = ch.
patterns.chineseText:
鸟图解（蜂鸟符号图）
自由造型钩织，从尾部起针，依次钩出尾羽、身体、翅膀、头部和喙。
使用短针(X)、长针(T)、锁针(o)等符号。
翅膀部分使用扇形针组合向外展开。
尾羽使用锁针链形成细长分叉。
patterns.notes: Freeform hummingbird symbol chart. This is a complex artistic piece requiring careful reading of the symbol chart for exact stitch placement. The bird is crocheted as a flat applique and sewn onto the scarf. Part of the flower & bird scarf.

patterns.englishText:
Sparrow (小山雀) — Complete Pattern
Key: X=sc, V=sc inc, A=sc dec, T=hdc, F=dc, FA=dc dec, TA=hdc dec, CH=chain

BODY (in the round):
Rnd 1: 7 sc in MR (7)
Rnd 2: sc inc in each st (14)
Rnd 3: *sc inc, 3 sc* ×3, sc inc, sc (18)
Rnd 4–5: sc in each st (18)
Rnd 6: 2 sc inc, 4×(sc, 3 sc inc) — verify stitch count
Rnd 7: sc inc, 30 sc, sc inc — verify count
Rnd 8: sc inc, 32 sc, sc inc — verify count
Rnd 9: sc inc, 34 sc, sc inc — verify count
Rnd 10: ch 2, dc dec, 26 sc, sc dec, hdc dec, dc dec

BEAK: Using contrasting color, ch 2, fasten off. Insert at Rnd 4 between sts 9 and 10.

TAIL: Ch 7, starting from 3rd ch from hook: hdc, sc, sl st ×3. Fasten off. Sew into first and last st of Rnd 9.

CLOSING:
Rnd 11: *sc, sc dec, sc* ×8 — stuff before this round (attach beak & tail first)
Rnd 12: *sc, sc dec* ×8
Rnd 13: hdc dec ×8
Fasten off, weave in ends.

WINGS (make 2, flat):
Leave long starting tail for sewing.
Row 1: Ch 5, sc in 2nd ch from hook, 3 sc, sc inc — change color
Row 2: Ch 1, turn, 4 sc, sc inc — change color
Row 3: Ch 1, turn, 6 sc
Row 4: Ch 1, turn, skip 1 st, 4 sc, (hdc, dc inc) in same st, ch 1 — fasten off leaving long tail
Attach left wing: insert at 5 sts left of beak, one row below. Right wing symmetrically.
patterns.chineseText: 小山雀图解（全套）。身体：环起,R1:7X,R2:7V,R3:*(V,3X),V,X(18),R4-5:18X,R6:2V,4*(X,3V),R7:V,30X,V,R8:V,32X,V,R9:V,34X,V,R10:2CH,FA,26X,A,TA,FA。嘴巴：取色线钩2CH断线，在R4第9和第10针入针。尾巴：7CH倒三钩T,X,3SL断线，缝入R9首尾针。R11:8*(X,A,X)塞棉（建议先缝嘴尾），R12:8*(X,A)，R13:8*TA，断线藏线。翅膀×2（片钩）：R1:5CH倒二钩3X,V换线；R2:1CH翻4X,V换线；R3:1CH翻6X；R4:1CH翻空一针4X(T,FV),1CH断线。左翅从嘴左第5针下一行同位置入针缝合。
patterns.notes: Rnd 6–9 stitch counts need verification — formula likely follows amigurumi standard increases. The body shaping creates the round bird form. Stuff firmly before closing.

patterns.englishText: Granny Square Chart — 'Ooh Holiday' motif by Little Mic (@小仙女的毛线圈). Symbol chart for a circular-to-square granny square worked from center outward. Features multiple rounds of bobble stitches and shell/fan clusters forming a square motif. Read counterclockwise from center. Finished size approx. 20×20cm. Full written pattern not transcribable from chart image alone — follow the chart symbols using the stitch reference (post 4, images 1–2).
patterns.chineseText: 方形花片（Ooh Holiday by Little Mic/@小仙女的毛线圈）符号钩织图解。由圆形中心向四角扩展，多圈蕾丝花样含枣形针和扇形花纹，最终为正方形。
patterns.notes: Complex granny square chart; requires symbol reference to read. Color scheme: blue, light blue, yellow, peach (see post images 1–5 for colorway guidance).

patterns.englishText:
Lizard Tom Pattern — Body + Inner Mouth + Tongue
Key: x=sc, f=dc, t=hdc, fv=dc inc, fa=dc dec, tv=hdc inc, ta=hdc dec, a=sc dec, w=sc 3-in-1

BODY (worked in rounds, main stitch: dc):
Rnd 1: 4 dc in MR (4)
Rnd 2: (dc, dc inc) ×2 (6)
Rnd 3: 6 dc (6)
Rnd 4: (dc, dc inc, dc) ×2 (8)
Rnd 5: (3 dc, dc inc) ×2 (10)
Rnd 6: 10 dc (10)
Rnd 7: 2 sc, hdc, 4 dc inc, hdc, 2 sc (14)
Rnd 8: sc dec, hdc inc, 8 dc, hdc inc, sc dec (14)
Rnd 9–11: sc dec, hdc inc, 8 dc, hdc inc, sc dec (14)
Rnd 12: hdc dec, 10 dc, hdc dec (12)
Rnd 13: dc inc, 2 dc, 6 hdc, 2 dc, dc inc (16)
Rnd 14: 2 dc, 3 hdc, 4 sc, 3 hdc, 2 dc (14)
Fasten off, invisible join, pull tight.

INNER MOUTH (oval, in sc):
Rnd 1: Ch 10, work oval around: 8 sc, sc 3-in-1 at tip, 7 sc back, sc inc at start-end
Rnd 2: sc inc, 7 sc, sc inc ×3 at tip, 7 sc, sc inc ×2 at other end
Rnd 3: (sc, sc inc) ×1, 7 sc, (sc, sc inc) ×3, 7 sc, (sc, sc inc) ×2
Fasten off, invisible weave.

TONGUE:
Ch 10, starting from 3rd ch from hook: 8 hdc. Fasten off.
patterns.chineseText:
小蜥蜴汤姆图解（主体+嘴巴里面部分+舌头）。符号：x=短针,f=长针,t=中长针,fv=长针加针,fa=长针减针,tv=中长针加针,ta=中长针减针,a=短针减针,w=短针1放3。
主体：R1:环起4f; R2:2(f,fv); R3:6f; R4:2(f,fv,f); R5:2(3f,fv); R6:10f; R7:2x,t,4fv,t,2x; R8:a,tv,8f,tv,a; R9-R11:同R8; R12:ta,10f,at; R13:fv,2f,6t,2f,fv; R14:2f,3t,4x,3t,2f。断线藏线。
嘴巴里面：R1:起10ch椭圆形：8x,w,7x,v; R2:v,7x,3v,7x,2v; R3:(x,v),7x,3(x,v),7x,2(x,v)。断线。
舌头：起10ch,倒3织8t。
patterns.notes: Main body uses dc (long stitch) as primary stitch — unusual for amigurumi. Stitch counts for Rnds 8–12 should be verified by crafter.

patterns.englishText:
Lizard Tom — Upper Jaw + Lower Jaw + Assembly

UPPER JAW (flat piece, in dc):
Row 1: dc inc, 6 dc, dc inc (10)
Row 2: dc dec, 8 dc, dc dec (8)
Row 3: dc dec, 4 dc, dc dec (6)
Row 4: dc dec, 2 dc, dc dec (4)
Fasten off.

LOWER JAW (flat piece, in hdc):
Row 1: 6 hdc (from a chain start) (6)
Row 2: hdc dec, 2 hdc, hdc dec (4)

ASSEMBLY: Join Inner Mouth to Lower Jaw and crochet together; work one round of sc around entire mouth edge. Upper jaw picks up 8 sts; lower jaw picks up 6 sts (see photo for reference).
patterns.chineseText: 小蜥蜴汤姆图解（上嘴+下嘴+组合）。上嘴-片织：R1:fv,6f,fv(10); R2:fa,8f,fa(8); R3:fa,4f,fa(6); R4:fa,2f,fa(4)。断线。下嘴-片织：R1:6t; R2:ta,2t,ta(4)。把嘴巴里面部分跟着一起织，沿着嘴巴织一圈。组合时参考实物图：上嘴8针目入针，下嘴6针目入针。
patterns.notes: Upper jaw in dc, lower jaw in hdc. Assembly photo shows final mouth orientation.

patterns.englishText:
Lizard Tom — Eyes + Hands + Feet

EYES (make 2):
Rnd 1: 6 sc in MR (6)
Rnd 2: 6 sc (6)
Fasten off and sew to body.

HANDS (make 2) — attach directly to body:
Insert hook at appropriate position between Rnds 12–13 on body, working in BLO.
Ch 7, sl st in 2nd ch from hook ×2, ch 2, sl st ×2, ch 2, sl st ×2, then 4 sc back at base.
(Creates 3 finger-like extensions.)

FEET (make 2) — attach directly to body:
Insert hook at appropriate position between Rnds 7–8 on body, working in BLO.
Ch 8, sl st in 2nd ch from hook ×2, ch 2, sl st ×2, then 5 sc back at base.
(Creates 2 toe-like extensions.)
patterns.chineseText: 小蜥蜴汤姆图解（眼睛+手+脚）。眼睛×2：R1:环起6x; R2:6x。手×2：主体R12-R13处入针，都织里山，起7ch倒2织2sl,起2ch倒2织2sl,起2ch倒2织2sl,4x。脚×2：主体R7-R8处入针，都织里山，起8ch倒2织2sl,起2ch倒2织2sl,5x。
patterns.notes: Hands and feet are worked directly into the body, not made separately. BLO = back loop only throughout.
